prompt: A surreal yet photorealistic night scene on a vast calm reflective water surface under a deep star-filled sky. A bright full moon hangs on the upper left, with the Milky Way and faint green-blue aurora stretching across the background. In the real world, keep everything simple and realistic: a slim woman with shoulder-length dark hair walks barefoot from left to right across the water, wearing a black elegant slit evening dress. Her posture is natural and poised, and her face is softly obscured or out of focus. The water surface is smooth and mirrorlike, with subtle ripples and realistic moonlight reflections. Place the symbolic magic mainly in the reflection: beneath her feet, instead of a normal reflection, a luminous ethereal white-blue line-art tiger appears inside the water, curled in motion and glowing like energy or moonlight. The tiger is sniffing or approaching a single glowing rose near the lower right area of the reflection. Around the rose, add exactly 6 small glowing butterfly-like light fragments rising upward in a gentle arc. Use cinematic lighting, high contrast, cool blue tones, dreamy atmosphere, ultra-detailed reflection effects, and a clean fine-art fantasy photography style. Add a delicate cursive caption centered near the bottom edge of the image that reads In me the tiger sniff the rose.. Rounded-corner framed composition, vertical social-media screenshot aesthetic, but the main artwork itself should be the focus.
